text: Da kyau, zan iya sanin sunanka, don Allah?

text: An ba ni z-pak antibiotic a ranar Laraba da ta gabata (kwaya don kwanaki 5 amma yana ɗaukar cikakken kwanaki 10 don yin cikakken aiki).  Jiya, alamun rashin lafiya sun dawo kuma Ina jin muni a yau.
reference: An ba ni z-pak antibiotic a ranar Laraba da ta gabata (kwaya don kwanaki 5 amma yana ɗaukar cikakken kwanaki 10 don yin cikakken aiki).  Jiya, alamun rashin lafiya sun dawo kuma Ina jin muni a yau.
hypothesis: An bane zubaƙa ci bayo tikara nan lahira mar ta gabata, ƙwaya don kwana ke biyar amma na ɗaukar cika kan kwana ke goma don yin cika ciki. Jiya alamun rashin lafiya sun dawo kamar ina jarumuni a Nigeria
